name: Milk Glass Solid Wall Sconce Black/White - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Light up your home office or any other area using the Milk Glass Solid Wall Sconce from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made with metal, this black wall sconce features a white milk glass globe shade for a traditional look that works well with a variety of existing decor. The sconce comes with a socket turn knob rotary switch and fabric-covered cord so you can place it by any outlet to add a beautiful touch of illumination to your space.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
